outcome_record.event_name: IPL 2027 Round 3 — Mumbai Indians vs RCB (Wankhede, evening)

prediction.pre_match_note: IPL R3 Wankhede evening. Humidity 78% — DEW RISK HIGH. Toss won by MI (batting first). Prediction: MI defend despite dew — MI death bowling specialist (Bumrah) overcomes dew. SMS 68 reflects uncertainty.

outcome.final_score: MI defended, won by 8 runs. Dew present but Bumrah bowled superbly.

calibration_flags.notes: Dew present but elite death bowling (Bumrah) overcame it. This nuances the dew_factor model: dew is significant but elite death bowling can partially negate it. The dew_factor should be applied as a probability modifier, not a certainty.
